content.speakerText: Why this scholarship? What’s your plan after graduation?
content.speakerTextCn: 为什么选这个奖学金？毕业后你有什么计划？

options.text: I need money to pay for rent and food.
This scholarship aligns with my goal to lead water policy reform at the UN, and I’ll use the network to build lasting partnerships.
I want to travel more after I graduate.
I’m not sure yet—I’ll figure it out after I finish my degree.

content.explanation: 正确答案将奖学金与明确的长期职业目标（联合国水资源政策）和资源利用（人脉网络）结合，体现责任感和规划性。干扰项一是只关注短期生存需求，二是缺乏目标导向，三是回避规划，均不符合‘体现责任感’的评分标准。

content.speakerText: How will you give back to the community once you've benefited from this opportunity?
content.speakerTextCn: 你受益后，打算如何回馈社会？

options.text: I’ll donate some money when I can.
I’ll create free online workshops teaching first-gen students how to apply for scholarships and write strong personal statements.
I guess I’ll help out if someone asks me.
I want to get a high-paying job and live a good life.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体、可执行、非空泛的回馈方式（免费在线工作坊），符合‘具体化回馈’的要求。干扰项一是模糊的金钱捐赠，二是被动回应，四是只关注个人利益，均缺乏社会责任感的体现。

content.speakerText: What motivates you to pursue this degree, and how does it connect to your long-term vision?
content.speakerTextCn: 是什么激励你追求这个学位？它如何与你的长期愿景联系起来？

options.text: I like the campus and the weather here.
I’m inspired by my mother’s work in rural education—I want to design scalable tech tools to bring learning to underserved areas.
Everyone I know is studying abroad, so I thought I should too.
I need a degree to impress my family.

content.explanation: 正确答案将个人经历（母亲的教育工作）与可衡量的长期愿景（设计科技工具服务弱势地区）结合，体现内在动机与社会价值。干扰项均基于外部因素（环境、从众、家庭压力），缺乏个人使命感和清晰目标。

content.template: I need this scholarship to focus on my thesis, and after graduation, I plan to ______ a nonprofit in my hometown.
content.hint: 表达‘创办’非营利组织的动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：start a nonprofit（创办非营利组织）

content.template: I’ll ______ free online content—videos and blogs—to help students from my country understand how to apply for scholarships.
content.hint: 表达‘制作’教育内容的动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：create online content（制作在线内容）

content.template: This scholarship isn’t just about money—it’s a ______ to become a global leader in sustainable development.
content.hint: 奖学金作为实现更大目标的‘工具’或‘基础’
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：a platform to do something（实现目标的平台）

content.speakerText: Why this scholarship? What’s your plan after graduation?
content.speakerTextCn: 为什么选这个奖学金？毕业后你有什么计划？
expectedAnswers: I’m pursuing this scholarship to gain the skills and network needed to lead water access projects in sub-Saharan Africa. After graduation, I’ll join an international NGO and eventually launch my own initiative.
This scholarship will help me complete my research on sustainable irrigation. Then I’ll return home to train farmers using low-cost tech solutions.
I need funding to finish my thesis, and after that, I’ll work for the UN.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰连接奖学金与毕业后的具体职业或社会目标
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，是否避免口语化空洞表达（如'I need money'）
表达自然度：是否使用符合语境的学术/职业表达（如'launch an initiative', 'train farmers', 'join an NGO'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 scholarship, graduation, plan, network, impact 等关键词

content.speakerText: How will you give back to the community once you've benefited from this opportunity?
content.speakerTextCn: 你受益后，打算如何回馈社会？
expectedAnswers: I’ll launch a mentorship program for first-generation students, offering paid workshops on application strategies and cultural adaptation.
I’ll record and share free video tutorials on my YouTube channel about navigating the scholarship application process in developing countries.
I plan to volunteer with local education NGOs and organize annual seminars for high school students interested in studying abroad.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否提供具体、可操作的回馈方式，而非模糊承诺（如'I'll try to help'）
语言准确性：是否正确使用动词搭配（launch a program, share tutorials, organize seminars）
表达自然度：是否使用真实语境中的表达，避免中式英语或生硬结构
关键词覆盖：是否包含 give back, mentor, workshops, online content, community, share 等关键词

content.speakerText: What personal experience inspired your career goals, and how will this scholarship help you achieve them?
content.speakerTextCn: 什么个人经历启发了你的职业目标？这个奖学金将如何帮助你实现它们？
expectedAnswers: Growing up without clean water in my village made me passionate about environmental justice. This scholarship will give me the research tools and global connections to design affordable filtration systems.
My sister couldn’t afford university, so I’m determined to create scholarship access programs. This funding will let me focus on policy research instead of part-time work.
I witnessed how education transforms communities in rural areas. With this scholarship, I can gain the expertise to build scalable digital learning platforms for underserved regions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否将个人经历与职业目标清晰关联，并说明奖学金的关键作用
语言准确性：是否正确使用因果连接词（made me, so I’m, with this）和专业术语（filtration systems, digital platforms）
表达自然度：是否体现真实情感与逻辑连贯，避免模板化表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 personal experience, inspired, scholarship, achieve, impact, community 等关键词
